title: nonatelia sprucei
intro: Nonatelia sprucei, also known as Mexican buckthorn or Tecoma sprucei, is a shrub native to Mexico and Central America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Nonatelia sprucei is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
